title: Supply Chain Manager - TVS Supply Chain Solutions - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - TVS Supply Chain Solutions - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Supply Chain Manager at our Tiruchirappalli location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About TVS Supply Chain Solutions:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in TMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TVS Supply Chain Solutions!
